overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage of a medieval great hall reminiscent of Hogwarts, featuring floating candle chandeliers, long dining tables filled with students, gothic stone architecture, and large stained glass windows. The camera maintains a steady elevated perspective overlooking the entire hall with warm magical lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval great hall with floating candles and dining tables

agents.ego_description: stationary elevated view overlooking the great hall from above the dining tables

entered.detail: hundreds of floating candles suspended in mid-air providing warm magical illumination throughout the hall
rows of long wooden tables set with plates and food, occupied by students
tall gothic arched windows with blue twilight visible through colored glass panes
decorative banners and tapestries hanging on the stone walls between tall windows
stone fireplace with burning fire casting light and shadows on the floor

segments.scene_description: A cinematic elevated view of a medieval great hall filled with students seated at long dining tables. Hundreds of floating candles illuminate the space with warm light, while large stained glass windows show twilight outside. The stone architecture features decorative tapestries and a large fireplace, creating a magical atmosphere reminiscent of a wizarding school dining hall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, elevated perspective across a magical medieval great hall, capturing the immersive scale of a wizarding school's dining area. It begins by gliding over long dining tables where students are seated, bathed in the warm, flickering glow of hundreds of floating candles. As the camera moves, the view expands to reveal the intricate gothic stone architecture, highlighting decorative tapestries and a massive, roaring fireplace. The scene then shifts toward the perimeter of the hall, where large stained glass windows frame a deepening twilight sky. Finally, the movement settles into a sweeping overlook that integrates the golden interior light with the cool blue tones of the evening outside.
